channel.title: Iscsi on Al's Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Iscsi on Al's Ramblings

item.title: MSOSUG October Meeting
item.description: So this months MSOSUG meeting had it’s second run at the new venue a pretty good turn out which seems to be consistent. Given the way Oracle has handled the whole OpenSolaris deal I’m a little surprised to be honest.

item.title: Moving an iscsi zvol to a new pool
item.description: Been working on fixing my 4K sector disk write performance issue, will post something on that later. So I have create a new zpool and after zfs send | zfs receive on the various zfs volumes and filesystem I was left to figure out how to move my iscsi guid’s as follows
